languages.text: {n}Сгорбленный {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрец{/g} на противоположной стороне стола разражается сердитой бинарной трелью, пытаясь удержать мечущегося и стонущего больного. Наконец, он тоже поднимает лицевую пластину:{/n} "Жизнеформа "генетор мажорис Ферренц" приветствует Лорда-капитана {name} фон Валанциус и присоединяется к высказыванию коллеги".

traits.locale_text: "Сканирую... Ценность священного {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугмента{/g} Зета-130 превышает эффективность пострадавшей жизнеформы в десятки раз. Рекомендую фармотерапию и литании выздоровления". {n}Шипит в ответ сгорбленный {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрец{/g}. Человек на койке протяжно стонет.{/n}
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: {n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."
languages.original_text: {n}Сгорбленный {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрец{/g} на противоположной стороне стола разражается сердитой бинарной трелью, пытаясь удержать мечущегося и стонущего больного. Наконец, он тоже поднимает лицевую пластину:{/n} "Жизнеформа "генетор мажорис Ферренц" приветствует Лорда-капитана {name} фон Валанциус и присоединяется к высказыванию коллеги".

After a while, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

{n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

"Denied. The value of the sacred augment Zeta-130 exceeds the productivity of the injured unit by a factor of ten. I recommend pharmotherapy and a litany of recuperation." {n}The hunched Tech-Priest's reply comes as a hiss. The man in the bed releases a drawn-out moan.{/n}

After a while, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

languages.text: 「却下。聖なるオーグメント・ゼータ-130の価値は、負傷ユニットの生産性を十倍上回る。薬物療法と回復のリタニーを推奨する。」{n}背を丸めたテックプリーストの返答は、シューと息を吐くような囁き声で発せられた。ベッドの男は、長く引きずるようなうめき声を漏らす{/n}
languages.original_text: "Denied. The value of the sacred augment Zeta-130 exceeds the productivity of the injured unit by a factor of ten. I recommend pharmotherapy and a litany of recuperation." {n}The hunched Tech-Priest's reply comes as a hiss. The man in the bed releases a drawn-out moan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「却下。聖なるオーグメント・ゼータ-130の価値は、負傷ユニットの生産性を十倍上回る。薬物療法と回復のリタニーを推奨する。」{n}背を丸めたテックプリーストの返答は、シューと息を吐くような囁き声で発せられた。ベッドの男は、長く引きずるようなうめき声を漏らす。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} voûté de l'autre côté de la table crache un trille binhaire furieux en tentant d'immobiliser le patient gémissant. Au bout de quelques instants, il tourne un visage recouvert de métal vers vous.{/n} « L'entité Genetor Majoris Ferrenz souhaite la bienvenue {au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} {name} von Valancius. Je suis du même avis que mon collègue. »
languages.original_text: {n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} voûté de l'autre côté de la table crache un trille binhaire furieux en tentant d'immobiliser le patient gémissant. Au bout de quelques instants, il tourne un visage recouvert de métal vers vous.{/n} « L'entité Genetor Majoris Ferrenz souhaite la bienvenue {au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} {name} von Valancius. Je suis du même avis que mon collègue. »

languages.text: {n}Masanın karşı tarafındaki kambur {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}, çırpınan ve inleyen hastayı hareketsiz hâle getirmeye çalışırken ikilidilde öfkeli tiz bir ses çıkarıyor. Bir süre sonra o da metal kaplı suratını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Genetör Majoris Ferrenz adlı yaşam formu, Lord Kaptan {name} von Valancius'a hoş geldin diyor. Meslektaşımın sözlerine katılıyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Masanın karşı tarafındaki kambur {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}, çırpınan ve inleyen hastayı hareketsiz hâle getirmeye çalışırken ikilidilde öfkeli tiz bir ses çıkarıyor. Bir süre sonra o da metal kaplı suratını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Genetör Majoris Ferrenz adlı yaşam formu, Lord Kaptan {name} von Valancius'a hoş geldin diyor. Meslektaşımın sözlerine katılıyorum."

languages.text: "Scanne ... Der Wert der heiligen Augmentation Zeta-130 übersteigt die Produktivität der verwundeten Einheit um den Faktor zehn. Ich empfehle eine Pharmotherapie und eine Litanei der Genesung." {n}Die Antwort des gebeugten {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriesters{/g} ist ein Zischen. Der Mann auf dem Bett stößt ein erschöpftes Stöhnen aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der gebückte {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Texhpriester{/g} auf der anderen Seite des Tisches stößt ein wütendes binhärisches Trillern aus, als er versucht, den um sich schlagenden Patienten zu fixieren. Nach einiger Zeit wendet auch er dir sein metallverstärktes Gesicht zu.{/n} "Die Lebensform Genetor Majoris Ferrenz grüßt Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. Ich unterstütze die Aussage meines Kollegen."

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} encorvado al otro lado de la mesa suelta un furioso trino binario mientras intenta inmovilizar a su paciente, que gime y se debate sin cesar. Tras un momento, gira su cara, chapada en metal, hacia ti.{/n} «La forma de vida genetor majoris Ferrenz da la bienvenida a{mf|l| la} Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. Coincido con la afirmación de mi colega».
languages.original_text: {n}The hunched {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} on the opposite side of the table erupts in a furious binharic trill as he struggles to immobilise the thrashing and moaning patient. After a time, he likewise turns his metal-plated face to you.{/n} "The life form Genetor Majoris Ferrenz welcomes Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. I second my colleague's statement."

traits.locale_text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} encorvado al otro lado de la mesa suelta un furioso trino binario mientras intenta inmovilizar a su paciente, que gime y se debate sin cesar. Tras un momento, gira su cara, chapada en metal, hacia ti.{/n} «La forma de vida genetor majoris Ferrenz da la bienvenida a{mf|l| la} Lord Captain {name} von Valancius. Coincido con la afirmación de mi colega».

languages.text: {n}桌子对面佝偻着身子的{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}一边费力地按住那个挣扎扭动、呻吟不止的病人，一边发出愤怒的二进制尖啸。过了一会儿，他将那张镶着金属板的脸转向你。{/n}“高级基因士，费伦茨生命体向{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯舰长大人致意。我赞同同僚的意见。”
